positive: Minimalist geometric forest spirit creature, stylized silhouette design, centered composition, featuring stylized antlers and flowing organic lines, deep emerald and sapphire tones contrasted against creamy off-white background. High contrast black outlines, vector art style, clean and crisp lines, suitable for all-over garment print. Designed for strong visibility on apparel. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, graphic design.
